releases.title: Building Import, Changelog, and About
releases.summary: Unified Fortify and CopyPaste imports, new site information pages, automatic version display, and assorted fixes.

changes.text: Added automatic Fortify text and CopyPaste JSON format detection to the Building Planner importer.
Added combined importing that routes structures to Building Planner and recognized electrical, industrial, farming, water, and lighting items to Systems Planner.
Added an import preview with planner destinations and add-or-replace options.
Added Rectangle Quick Fill for quickly estimating rectangular structures.
Fixed Fortify system sections being combined and incorrectly counted as Electrical Branches.
Fixed the Rectangle Quick Fill show and hide control.
Website version and latest-release details now update automatically from the newest published changelog entry.
